title: Linux History File Cleared
description: Detects clearing of command history files or unsetting of history environment variable, a common anti-forensics technique.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and ((msg like '*unset HISTFILE*') or (msg like '*history -c*'))
